info.description: .NET Core Global Tool for cleaning up solution, project or folder

options.name: --paths
options.description: Defines the paths to clean. Defaults to 'bin', 'obj' and 'node_modules'.

options.name: --confirm-cleanup
options.description: Confirm prompt for file cleanup automatically.

options.name: --no-delete
options.description: Defines if files should be deleted, after confirmation.

options.name: --no-move
options.description: Defines if files should be moved before deletion, after confirmation.

options.name: --temp-path
options.description: Directory used to move files to before delete. Defaults to system Temp-folder.

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Sets the verbosity of the command. Allowed: Minimal, Normal, Detailed and Debug.

arguments.name: PATH
arguments.description: Path to solution/project/folder to clean. Defaults to current working directory.
